seoTitle: Join a Job Interview on Microsoft Teams as a Guest
metaDescription: Prepare for a Microsoft Teams job interview by joining through the browser as a guest, checking your camera, and reducing background distractions.
intro: Showing up prepared for a Teams interview means more than knowing your answers — it means the video call itself works without a hitch. This guide walks candidates through joining a Teams interview from an email link, checking hardware, and cleaning up their on-screen presence.

steps.heading: Open the meeting link from your invite
steps.body: Click the Join Meeting link inside your interview confirmation email to launch the landing page.

steps.heading: Skip the app install
steps.body: Choose Continue on this browser so you can run the interview instantly through Chrome or Edge without downloading anything.

steps.heading: Allow camera and mic access
steps.body: Click Allow on the browser prompts so Teams can access your camera and microphone.

steps.heading: Enter your name and check your framing
steps.body: Type your full professional name, then review the pre-join preview thumbnail to confirm good lighting and camera placement.

steps.heading: Apply a background blur and join
steps.body: Turn on background blur to reduce distractions, then click Join Now and wait in the lobby for the hiring manager to admit you.

faq.question: Do I need a Microsoft account to join a Teams interview?
faq.answer: No, guests can join with just a display name through the browser, without needing a paid Microsoft 365 license.

faq.question: Should I install the Teams app before my interview?
faq.answer: It's not required — choosing Continue on this browser lets you join directly without any installation.

faq.question: How do I reduce visual distractions from my home office?
faq.answer: Toggle on background blur before joining to obscure the room behind you.

faq.question: Why is there a waiting period after I click Join Now?
faq.answer: This is the digital lobby, where the interview host needs to manually grant you entry into the call.
